emails.body: Duke Exchange 2/00 Daren: Please change the demand charge for deal 157278 for 2/00 to $1,247.90. Katherine did not include the excess fee when she gave you the cashout. $1,008.87 cashout $239.03 excess $1,247.90 Total Thanks, Megan
